arts.ttl: Wolves sign Reims defender Agbadou for £16.6m
arts.sum: Wolves complete the £16.6m signing of defender Emmanuel Agbadou from Reims on a four-and-a-half year deal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal entitlement laughable as Bothroyd wrong on Alexander Isak and Newcastle
arts.sum: "That happens in football and I feel if you were to go to Isak and his representatives and say, 'Do you want to play for Arsenal Football Club?' Arsenal Football Club are a step forward regardless of where Newcastle are right now." "With all due respect to Newcastle, they're on an upward trajectory, they have got the Saudi backing and they're a very good club, but Arsenal are one of the biggest clubs in the world," the former Gunners academy striker told Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Wolves Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Newcastle will be looking for a ninth consecutive win across all competitions when they host Wolves at St James’ Park on Wednesday night. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score predi...

arts.ttl: Sources: Chelsea and Newcastle have scouted Serie A youngster who rejected Man United move
arts.sum: TBR Football understand that Chelsea and Newcastle United are among the clubs watching Parma goalkeeper Zion Suzuki who is making quite a name for himself...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs. Wolves: Streak lasting 119 years at risk in Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers will be defending a 119-year streak when they square off against Newcastle United in the Premier League on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Newcastle's summer transfer ambitions rests on what they do in next four months
arts.sum: The cream of the crop may be fully aware of the United's stature in European football, but careers are short, and they don't need to take risks on signing for a club with potential when they have offers from Champions League sides with bulging trophy cabinets. Newcastle United's ability to truly compete in the summer transfer may not be decided by balance sheets and careful financial juggling, but by what they do ON the field in the next four months.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho makes Newcastle United request as Lloyd Kelly 'right price' transfer stance emerges
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho is the man driving the bid for Kelly but the suggested price is said to have fallen way below Newcastle's expectations and the club known as the Yellow Canaries must return with a more tempting offer . Mourinho is said to be keen on Kelly and has requested Fener push on and try to seal a deal, but the Turkish second-placed side have also been talking to Aston Villa about former Newcastle transfer target Diego Carlos.

arts.ttl: 'I think': Alan Shearer makes claim about Lewis Hall at Newcastle that Gary Lineker immediately agrees with
arts.sum: In the summer, Lewis Hall’s switch from Chelsea to Newcastle United became a permanent deal, a player who didn’t feature too often under Eddie Howe...

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle welcome Wolves to St James’ Park this evening looking to continue their brilliant run of form. Eddie Howe’s side are seeking a ninth straight win in all competitions. The Magpies overcame fourth-tier Bromley to progress in the FA Cup at the weekend and are also in pole position to reach the Carabao Cup final. […] The post Newcastle vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's solution to toughest Newcastle decision as new undroppable emerges
arts.sum: For perhaps the first time since he arrived at the club, Howe has a huge dilemma over who to pick in the centre of his Newcastle United defence for tonight's game against Wolves - and in the remainder of the campaign. However, Fabian Schar is back from suspension, having hit top form again this season, while Dan Burn has been imperious alongside him in the heart of the United backline.
